name: Armstrong Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Armstrong Tennis Center in Hampden, ME! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts are private.

name: ATC Tennis and Pickleball also Known as Armstrong Tennis
description: ATC Tennis and Pickleball also Known as Armstrong Tennis is a place to play pickleball in Hampden, ME. There are 11 hard courts. 3 are outdoors and 8 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, food, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Bangor Recreational Building
description: Come play pickleball at Bangor Recreational Building in Bangor, ME! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Brewer Athletics Heddericg Field Courts
description: This is part of the Brewer High School Athletics Complex, and subsequently is shared use between the school and the community. Public use is permitted when the school is not utilizing the courts.

name: Brewer Auditorium
description: Brewer Auditorium is a place to play pickleball in Brewer, ME. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Mattanawcook Academy
description: Mattanawcook Academy is a place to play pickleball in Lincoln, ME. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Mattanawcook Junior High School
description: Mattanawcook Junior High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lincoln, ME. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Old Town-Orono YMCA
description: Old Town-Orono YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Old Town, ME. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water.

name: Skehan Recreation Center
description: Skehan Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hampden, ME. There are 4 indoor wood and acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Stearns High School
description: Stearns High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Millinocket, ME. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: UMA Bangor Fitness Center
description: Bring indoor shoes.  Pickleballs available to use.

name: Veterans of Foreign Wars Park
description: Veterans of Foreign Wars Park is a place to play pickleball in Hampden, ME. There are 2 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Williams Park
description: Come play pickleball at Williams Park in Bangor, ME! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility is wheelchair accessible. The courts are free.
